name: Dictators:No Peace Countryballs
short_description: Dictators : No Peace Countryballs is a war simulation and dictator game. This is a fun,simple and some say a funny countryballs game. If you like simulation games, you will love playing Dictators : No Peace. Play as a dictator of your favourite country and colonize the world.
detailed_description:
Dictators : No Peace Countryballs is a war simulation and dictator game.

This is a fun,simple and some say a funny countryballs game.

If you like simulation games, you will love playing Dictators : No Peace.

Play as a dictator of your favourite country and colonize the world.

Start ruling the world :
Increase your gold reserves by upgrading your production activities.
Also increase your gold reserves by trading goods.
Use the gold reserves to upgrade your military and then Colonize.

Become the greatest President of your country and the greatest dictator of all time.

Have fun playing Dictators : No Peace.

English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Turkish*
